title: Can we turn off Pre-made automations showing up on an account?
excerpt: These are showing up randomly on boards.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: These are showing up randomly on boards.

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bruce,

You can turn those off in the Customization tab in Admin settings. This only applies to new boards, so you’ll still have to manually turn off/delete the automations from any pre-existing boards
